theorem map_fst_nhdsWithin_eq {x : Оұ Г— ОІ} {s : Set Оұ} :
    map Prod.fst (рқ“қ[Prod.fst вҒ»В№' s] x) = рқ“қ[s] x.1 := by
  cases x
  rw [вҶҗ prod_univ, nhdsWithin_prod_eq, nhdsWithin_univ, map_fst_prod]

theorem nhdsWithin_preimage_fst_le {x : Оұ Г— ОІ} {s : Set Оұ} :
    рқ“қ[Prod.fst вҒ»В№' s] x вүӨ comap Prod.fst (рқ“қ[s] x.1) := by
  rw [вҶҗ map_fst_nhdsWithin_eq]
  exact le_comap_map

theorem Filter.Eventually.nhdsWithin_preimage_fst {z : Оұ Г— ОІ} {s : Set Оұ} {p : Оұ Г— ОІ вҶ’ Prop}
    (h : вҲҖб¶  x in рқ“қ[s] z.1, вҲҖ y, p (x, y)) : вҲҖб¶  z' in рқ“қ[Prod.fst вҒ»В№' s] z, p z' := by
  rw [вҶҗ map_fst_nhdsWithin_eq, eventually_map] at h
  exact h.mono fun z hz вҶҰ hz _

theorem Filter.EventuallyEq.nhdsWithin_preimage_fst {z : Оұ Г— ОІ} {s : Set Оұ} {f g : Оұ Г— ОІ вҶ’ Оі}
    (h : f.curry =б¶ [рқ“қ[s] z.1] g.curry) : f =б¶ [рқ“қ[Prod.fst вҒ»В№' s] z] g :=
  Filter.Eventually.nhdsWithin_preimage_fst <| by simp_rw [вҶҗ funext_iff]; exact h

theorem eventually_mem_nhds_within' {Оұ} [TopologicalSpace Оұ] {s t : Set Оұ} {a : Оұ} :
    (вҲҖб¶  x in рқ“қ[s] a, t вҲҲ рқ“қ[s] x) вҶ” t вҲҲ рқ“қ[s] a :=
  eventually_eventually_nhdsWithin

theorem eventually_mem_nhds_within'' {Оұ} [TopologicalSpace Оұ] {s t : Set Оұ} {a : Оұ} :
    (вҲҖб¶  x in рқ“қ a, t вҲҲ рқ“қ[s] x) вҶ” t вҲҲ рқ“қ[s] a :=
  eventually_nhds_nhdsWithin

-   `fвӮғ = вҶ‘(IB.prod (PartialEquiv.refl F)).symm`

The map `fun x => x.2` is the identity map on F.

`e'.coordChangeL e y` is the map from `F` to `F` given by `fun v => e'.coordChangeL e y v`.

So the map is `fun v => e'.coordChangeL e y v`. This is the identity map on F if `e'.coordChangeL e y` is the identity.
